weaponLimitRule.ruleText: A survivor may equip at most 2 weapon items. Those weapons may have the same name (for example, two Katars) or two different names. The number of distinct equipped weapon names can never exceed 2.

cardCopyRule.ruleText: Each equipped item instance contributes 1 copy of each of its cards by default. A survivor can train a specific card from that specific item instance to add extra copies, up to 3 total copies of that card from that one item.
cardCopyRule.duplicateItemRule: Duplicate items are tracked separately by gearInstanceId. Two identical weapons can each train their own copies, but each item instance is still capped at 3 copies of a given card.
cardCopyRule.unequipRule: Extra copies granted by an item are removed from the deck immediately when that item is unequipped, destroyed, or no longer valid.

progressionSuggestion.copy2: Unlock the second copy after 3 successful plays of that card while the item is equipped, then pay 1 matching resource or 1 generic resource.
progressionSuggestion.copy3: Unlock the third copy after 6 total successful plays of that card while the item is equipped, then pay 1 rare/matching quarry resource or 2 generic resources.
progressionSuggestion.successfulPlayDefinition: The card resolves at least one meaningful effect: damage, block, healing, draw/filtering, status application, survival gain, resource gain, or party support.

cardCopyRule.implementationReminder: Do not duplicate rows in the static card table for trained copies. Build the runtime deck by expanding cards according to each survivor's gearCardTraining state.
